title: Nootjes SMP Hardcore
description: A performance-focused modpack for the NootjesCraft Hardcore SMP, including Simple Voice Chat and quality-of-life improvements.
body:
## 📜 About this Modpack
The **NootjesCraft Modpack** is created for the **NootjesCraft Hardcore SMP** server.  
It includes performance mods, optimizations, and the **Simple Voice Chat** mod to improve the gameplay experience.

🎮 **All players on the NootjesCraft SMP are required to use this pack.**

---

## ❤️ How to install the modpack?

Download the **Modrinth App**  
Search for **NootjesCraft Modpack**  
Click **Install**  
Start the instance, check your settings / keybinds, and enjoy!

---

## ❓ Questions?
Feel free to ask them in the **NootjesCraft Discord**.

---

## 📦 Inspiration
This modpack is inspired by the **CreatorSMP Modpack**.  
This modpack uses **VanillaTweaks**: https://modrinth.com/mod/vanillatweaks

---

# 🇳🇱 Nederlandse Beschrijving

Deze pack is gemaakt voor de NootjesCraft Hardcore SMP server. De pack bevat performance-mods en de Simple Voice Chat-mod om de speelervaring te verbeteren.

🎮 **Elke speler op de NootjesCraft SMP dient deze pack te gebruiken.**

---

❤️ **Hoe installeer je de modpack?**

Download de **Modrinth App**  
Zoek naar **NootjesCraft Modpack**  
Klik op **Install**  
Start de instantie, controleer je instellingen / keybinds en veel plezier!

---

❓ **Vragen?**  
Stel ze gerust in de Discord van NootjesCraft.

---

📦 **Inspiratie**  
Deze modpack is geïnspireerd op de CreatorSMP Modpack.
